name: contract-lifecycle-engine
description: Contract obligation tracking and deadline management via AI-powered extraction

tools.name: create_contract
tools.description: Create a new contract in draft status

tools.name: list_contracts
tools.description: List contracts with filtering by status, counterparty, type, tags, expiration

tools.name: activate_contract
tools.description: Activate a draft contract with effective and end dates

tools.name: upload_document
tools.description: Upload a contract document (PDF, DOCX, TXT)

tools.name: extract_obligations
tools.description: Trigger AI-powered obligation extraction from contract documents

tools.name: list_obligations
tools.description: List obligations with filtering by status, type, contract, due date

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get analytics dashboard with active contracts, overdue counts, upcoming deadlines

tools.name: get_deadline_calendar
tools.description: Get obligations with deadlines in a date range
